cards.name: King of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: abundance, prosperity, security, ambitious, safe, kind, patriarchal, protective, businessman, provider, sensual, reliable

cards.name: ⅩⅩⅠ The World
cards.interpretation: completion, achievement, fulfilment, sense of belonging, wholeness, harmony

cards.name: Ⅸ The Hermit, reversed
cards.interpretation: loneliness, isolation, recluse, being anti-social, rejection, returning to society
